mapper.select: SELECT id, name, path, component, icon, order_index, parent_id, type, external_url, target, status FROM menus ORDER BY order_index ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.order_index, m.parent_id, m.type, m.external_url, m.target, m.status FROM menus m INNER JOIN role_menus rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.order_index ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.order_index, m.parent_id, m.type, m.external_url, m.target, m.status FROM menus m INNER JOIN role_menus rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.order_index ASC
SELECT DISTINCT m.id FROM menus m INNER JOIN role_menus rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 1
SELECT id, name, path, component, icon, order_index, parent_id, type, external_url, target, status FROM menus WHERE parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id = 0 ORDER BY order_index ASC
SELECT id, name, path, component, icon, order_index, parent_id, type, external_url, target, status FROM menus WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (name, path, component, icon, order_index, parent_id, type, external_url, target, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{orderIndex}, #{parentId}, #{type}, #{externalUrl}, #{target}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, order_index = #{orderIndex}, parent_id = #{parentId}, type = #{type}, external_url = #{externalUrl}, target = #{target}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
